svg.title: Databricks production catalog architecture for datapoem.com
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing two workspaces (N Virginia and Ohio), each containing 7 catalogs following the Medallion architecture with bronze, silver, and gold layers, with databases nested inside each catalog

g.text: N Virginia · Ohio (same structure in both)
Landing zone — raw data exactly as received from vendors

svg.text: Silver layer — cleaned and processed data

g.text: Downstream data for RA and Insights agent

svg.text: Data flow through the medallion architecture
